text: BREAKING: Golani Brigade conducts cross-border raid across Litani River in southern Lebanon — first ground incursion since 2006 war. IDF says 'anti-terror operation' neutralized Hezbollah tunnel complex. Lebanese army confirms IDF withdrawal after 6-hour operation. 13 Lebanese killed in associated airstrikes on Kfar Dounine.
verificationNote: Times of Israel and Al Jazeera Day 74 liveblog confirmed Golani operation. Lebanese NNA and UNIFIL confirmed cross-border movement.

text: ASSESSMENT: Kuwait intercepted IRGC Quds Force infiltration attempt on Bubiyan Island naval station. 4 operatives captured with explosives and reconnaissance equipment. Kuwait summoned Iran ambassador, recalled its own from Tehran. First direct Iran-Kuwait military incident — expands conflict geography significantly.
verificationNote: Kuwait News Agency (KUNA) official statement confirmed. Al Arabiya and Reuters reported ambassador recall.

text: REVEALED: Saudi Arabia conducted covert airstrikes on Houthi targets in Yemen over past 2 weeks — first Saudi strikes since 2023 ceasefire. WSJ reports MBS authorized strikes after Houthi missile targeted Jeddah desalination plant. Saudi officially denies involvement but satellite imagery confirms strike patterns consistent with Saudi F-15E aircraft.
verificationNote: Wall Street Journal exclusive report. Saudi denial on record. Satellite imagery analysis by Planet Labs consistent with claim.

text: ECONOMY: April CPI hits 3.8% — highest since Feb 2024. BLS data shows energy +11.2%, food +5.1%, transportation +8.7%. War-driven inflation now undeniable. Gas $4.50 national average per AAA. Hegseth faces Senate Armed Services Committee on $29B Pentagon war spending — requests $1.5T FY2027 defense budget.
verificationNote: Bureau of Labor Statistics official CPI release confirmed. AAA daily fuel gauge confirmed $4.50. C-SPAN broadcast Hegseth hearing.

text: DIPLOMACY: Trump departs for Beijing telling reporters 'we will finish the job' — 2-day summit with Xi May 14-15 to pressure China on Iran oil purchases and Hormuz mediation. USS Alaska (SSGN) transits Gibraltar heading to Mediterranean. India launches Bharat Maritime Initiative Partnership (BMIP) for Indian Ocean protection.
verificationNote: AP and Reuters confirmed Trump departure and 'finish the job' quote. USNI News confirmed USS Alaska transit. Indian MoD confirmed BMIP.

text: OIL SURGE: Brent crude hits $104.97 (+31.5% from pre-war), WTI breaks $101.63 (+34.6%). Hormuz Day 71 blockade continues — only 2.1M bpd transiting vs 15M pre-war. EU VP Kallas extends Operation Aspides to Hormuz. IEA emergency session called for Thursday on strategic reserve coordination.
verificationNote: CNBC and Bloomberg confirmed oil prices. EU Council press release confirmed Aspides extension. IEA confirmed emergency session.

text: LEBANON UPDATE: Hezbollah FPV fiber-optic drones continue targeting IDF positions — 24 attack waves in past 48h. 2 medics killed in Nabatieh airstrike on Islamic Health Society ambulance. Total Lebanese killed Day 74: 13 in Kfar Dounine strike alone. Israel Defense Ministry still seeking counter-drone solutions. 103 medical workers killed since war began.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera Day 74 liveblog confirmed casualties. Alma Center weekly report confirmed fiber-optic drone tactics. Lebanese Health Ministry figures.
